summary: AtBat subscriber AppleTV+ archive - Feed Select modal
description: GIVEN a user is an Audio Only subscriber

steps.action: WHEN a user selects an archive AppleTV+ game tile
steps.result:
THEN the user will see the AppleTV+ feed button with a lock icon
AND a message does not display letting the user know where the game can be watched
AND the user cannot playback the AppleTV+ feed
AND the user is taken to the Subscriptions page after selecting the feed button
